reviews.text: My fiancé and I just received our pictures today. I started crying the moment I saw the first photo. Not only are the photos gorgeous but the experience was nothing but extraordinary! For starters, we booked a 30 min. engagement shoot and are from out of state (Florida & Texas). The evening scheduled for photos had rain in the forecast. Eleanor the photographer kept us updated on when the rain would clear and was flexible with timing to ensure we got our session in. She was extremely communicative & friendly! We need more Eleanor’s in this world. The session itself also went well. She had multiple spots picked out for different backgrounds to showcase the beautiful landscape. She gave directions to us for poses and we had so much fun. We ended up with a huge variety of photos, landscape, portraits, close ups, etc. It was a super fun and comfortable experience for the two of us who have never done anything like this before! I highly recommend using Be Boulder Photography.

Eleanor took headshots for my business partner and me, and the entire experience was fantastic. We had so much fun while capturing beautiful, professional photos with Colorado’s stunning scenery as the backdrop.

Eleanor has a true talent for selecting the perfect time and location for a photoshoot. She made the process feel easy, fun, and relaxed, which helped us feel comfortable in front of the camera. We are so grateful for her expertise, creativity, and wonderful presence throughout the experience. Highly recommend!

This is the 2nd time I've had the opportunity to work with Eleanor and this time she captured special and intimate moments of my extended family!!! The pictures are absolutely stunning (I can't stop looking at them), creative and so fun! There were 12 of us in this photo shoot and it went off seamlessly, even with 3 babies and a pre-schooler! Eleanor is friendly and professional and so easy to work with. She has honed her craft and I'm grateful that we discovered her and her work!!! Thank you, Eleanor for capturing these precious moments that I will cherish forever!!!!

Eleanor took such great photos of our family and our son absolutely loves his senior pics! She made the whole experience just fun, easy and enjoyable. Eleanor has an eye for the perfect shot and did such a good job leading us to beautiful spots and keeping the whole vibe positive and relaxed. I can’t recommend Eleanor enough for any photography purpose…senior pics, family photos, headshots or weddings. Her professionalism, communication and overall presence made our time with her a lovely memory. We received our photo gallery right on time when she said we would. We’re having a hard time picking our favorites as they all turned out so well. Thank you Eleanor!

Eleanor did senior photos for both my kids, and the photos are truly gorgeous!  Eleanor is lovely, communicative, and super accommodating and easy to work with.  She was able to edit a couple photos quickly for my son to be able to submit to the yearbook, and she shot a family photos at the start of each of my kids' sessions.  I highly recommend Be Boulder Photography for the most beautiful photos and because Eleanor is a gem.  Thank you!
